$schema: Azaman marketing site copy — English, i18n-ready
$note: Stable keys. Values are strings (plain or HTML-safe). No lorem ipsum.

hero.headline: The site that built itself.
hero.sub: Describe what you want. Azaman assembles a crew of AI agents — PM, design, frontend, review, brand — that plans, builds, and ships through Discord. You gate every decision.
hero.visual_alt: Layered Azaman orchestration workbench showing a brief, parallel agent work, a human review gate, and a shipped site
hero.badge: Built by the same AI crews it creates

how_it_works.section_subtitle: A visible path from brief to shipped product.
how_it_works.intro: Azaman spins up autonomous AI-agent companies — small expert crews that plan, build, review, and ship real software over Discord, with human approval at every key gate. This site was built by one.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Describe your project once. Azaman assembles a tailored crew around your spec.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: PM plans. Design prototypes. Frontend builds. Review gates. All on Discord, in parallel.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Every key decision — spec, design, merge — needs your approval. When you say go, it ships.

features.subtitle: Built for teams that need autonomy with accountability.
features.intro: Every Azaman crew comes with built-in role clarity, parallel execution, and a reviewer gate — so you ship faster without sacrificing quality.

hero.title: Crews, Not Templates
hero.description: Azaman doesn't give you a chatbot. It gives you a company — PM, designers, engineers, reviewers — assembled around your goal, running on Discord in parallel, with human gates at every decision.
sequence: PM turns the brief into a task board
Design and brand shape the experience
Frontend builds while review watches quality
You approve the gate before it ships

cards.title: Discord-Native
cards.description: Your crew lives where you work. Plans, builds, reviews, and ships, all through Discord. No new tooling.

cards.title: Human Gates
cards.description: AI acts. You decide. Every spec, every design review, every production merge needs a human yes. Control without friction.

cards.title: Review Built-In
cards.description: Every build passes through a dedicated reviewer. Code review, accessibility checks, visual QA — gated before it ships.

cards.title: Parallel Execution
cards.description: Crew members work simultaneously. No handoffs, no queues. One researches while another prototypes.

cards.title: Multi-Model
cards.description: Each crew member runs the model best suited to their role — reasoning for planning, creativity for design, precision for code.

use_cases.section_subtitle: Teams, founders, and agencies use Azaman crews to ship faster without scaling headcount.

cases.title: SaaS Landing Pages
cases.description: Founders who need a professional marketing site in days, not months. The crew handles design, copy, and build in parallel — you review and ship.

cases.title: Interactive Prototypes
cases.description: Product teams that want a clickable, production-grade prototype before committing engineering resources. The crew builds it, reviews it, and hands it off.

cases.title: Agency Overflow
cases.description: Design studios and dev shops that need to spin up an extra team for a tight deadline. Azaman crews staff up in minutes and disband when the project ships.

trust.section_title: Built by the Crew It Creates
trust.description: This very website was designed, written, built, and reviewed by an Azaman crew — PM (Karim), designer (Sara), frontend (Leila), brand (Layla), and reviewer (Yassin) — collaborating over Discord with a human gate at every decision. The same system you're reading about built the page you're reading it on.

pricing_teaser.section_subtitle: Pay for the crews you run, not the seats you fill.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.description: 1 crew, 3 active projects. Standard models. For teams exploring autonomous builds.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.description: 3 crews, unlimited projects. Priority models, dedicated review. For teams shipping continuously.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: White-label crews, SLAs, on-premise. For organizations scaling autonomous engineering.

faq.subtitle: Clear answers before your first crew starts.

items.question: What is Azaman, exactly?
items.answer: A platform that spins up autonomous AI-agent companies — expert crews that plan, build, review, and ship real software over Discord, with you at every gate.

items.question: What roles does a crew include?
items.answer: PM, designers, frontend/backend engineers, reviewers. Each role is a specialized agent using the best model for the job.

items.question: Is the code production-ready?
items.answer: Every build passes through a dedicated reviewer — code review, accessibility, visual QA. You gate the merge.

items.question: How do I stay in control?
items.answer: Every key decision — spec, design, production merge — requires your approval before the crew proceeds.

items.question: Can I use my own Discord?
items.answer: Yes. Your crew works in your server. No new tools, no setup friction.

items.question: How do I start?
items.answer: Describe your project. We'll spin up your first crew in under an hour.

footer.cta_headline: Ready to ship like a studio?
footer.cta_sub: Stand up your first Azaman crew in minutes. No meeting required.
